tasks.deno-run-test: deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env --allow-run hql.ts run ./test/hello.hql && deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env --allow-run ./test/hello.js && deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env --allow-run hql.ts run ./test/add.hql && deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env --allow-run ./test/add.js
tasks.hql-run-test: hql run ./test/hello.hql && hql run ./test/add.hql && hql run ./test/hello.js && hql run ./test/add.js
tasks.transpile-test: hql transpile ./test/hello.hql ./test/transpiled/random_name.js && deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env ./test/transpiled/random_name.js && hql transpile ./test/hello.hql ../hello2.hql.js && deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env ../hello2.hql.js && hql transpile ./test/hello.hql ./test/transpiled/hello.hql.js && deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env ./test/transpiled/hello.hql.js
tasks.test: deno task clean && deno task unit-test && deno task deno-run-test && deno task hql-run-test && deno task transpile-test
